name: L.D.C. S.A.
summary: L.D.C. S.A. produces, sells, and exports poultry products in France, Poland, Spain, and internationally. The company operates in Poultry and Convenience divisions. It is involved in breeding pork, cattle, and rabbits; collecting cereals and agricultural supplies; producing, sorting, packaging, and selling eggs; and slaughtering activities. The company also offers fresh and frozen foods, including ready meals, pizzas, pancakes, exotic meals, and sandwiches; and pastries, quiches, tarts, pies, cooked meats, and sauces. In addition, it provides poultry-cuts and processed products, as well as other kinds of poultry, such as ducks and geese. The company offers its products under the Le Gaulois, Ma√É¬Ætre CoQ, Lou√É¬©, Marie, and Traditions d'Asie brands. L.D.C. S.A. was founded in 1968 and is based in Sabl√É¬©-sur-Sarthe, France.
